'''√g-y-z''' ('''kagayaz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadripartition|quadripartition]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-y-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadripartition|quadripartition]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √g-y-z
|-
! Lemma
| kagayaz
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thigayaz || jigayaz || shigayaz || kigayaz
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthugayaz || jujugayaz || shushugayaz || kukugayaz
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thugayaz || jugayaz || shugayaz || kugayaz
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thugayaz || jugayaz || shugayaz || kugayaz
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thegayaz || jegayaz || shegayaz || kegayaz
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothogayaz || jojogayaz || shoshogayaz || kokogayaz
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thogayaz || jogayaz || shogayaz || kogayaz
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thogayaz || jogayaz || shogayaz || kogayaz
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || gayaz || gayaz || gayaz || gayaz
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || gayaz || gayaz || gayaz || gayaz
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || gayaz || gayaz || gayaz || gayaz
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || gayaz || gayaz || gayaz || gayaz
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thægayaz || jægayaz || shægayaz || kægayaz
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathagayaz || jajagayaz || shashagayaz || kakagayaz
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thagayaz || jagayaz || shagayaz || kagayaz
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thagayaz || jagayaz || shagayaz || kagayaz
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shagayaz
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshagayaz
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishagayaz
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shagayaznü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshagayaznknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishagayaznü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shagayazshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshagayaznkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishagayazshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shagayazro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshagayaznkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishagayazro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shagayazmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshagayaznkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishagayazmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shagayazsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshagayaznksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishagayazsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shagayazng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshagayaznkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishagayazng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shagayazya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshagayaznkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishagayazya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shagayazyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshagayaznkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishagayazyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shagayaznüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshagayaznknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishagayaznüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shagayaznüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshagayaznknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishagayaznüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shagayaznümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshagayaznknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishagayaznümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shagayazshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshagayaznkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishagayazshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shagayazshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshagayaznkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishagayazshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shagayazshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshagayaznkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishagayazshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shagayazronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshagayaznkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishagayazronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shagayazroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshagayaznkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishagayazroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shagayazromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshagayaznkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishagayazromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shagayazmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshagayaznkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishagayazmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shagayazmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshagayaznkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishagayazmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shagayazmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshagayaznkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishagayazmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
